title: InnoHacks 2026
description: Unleash your coding potential! KIET's premier 24-hour hackathon where developers and innovators build real-world solutions. Includes specialized tracks for AI/ML and Web3. Win exciting prizes, mentorship from industry experts, and internship opportunities.
rules: Carry your own laptops and chargers

title: Epoque@Prastuti Cultural Fest
description: The ultimate celebration of talent! KIET's flagship cultural fest featuring high-octane dance battles, mesmerizing music performances, and stunning art galleries. Experience the grand fashion walk and celebrity guest appearances.

title: AI & Future Seminar
description: Step into the world of Intelligence. Join top researchers as we explore Generative AI, LLMs, and the ethics of automation. This seminar covers how AI is reshaping careers in 2026 and provides a roadmap for students to stay relevant.
rules: Prior registration is required for certificates
Submit questions for Q&A in advance

title: KIET Premier League (KPL)
description: Experience the Cricket Fever! KPL brings the thrill of professional cricket to our campus. 12 departments, one trophy. Intense league matches followed by a grand finale under floodlights.
rules: Participants must be from the same department

title: Rhapsody: Battle of Bands
description: Let the music take control! A high-energy competition where the best student bands from across the region face off in a rock & metal showdown. The winner gets a chance to record their original track in a professional studio.
rules: Bands must bring their own instruments (except drums)

title: RoboWars Championship
description: Where Metal Meets Might! Witness heavily armored, custom-built robots clash in a bullet-proof arena. This technical challenge tests mechanical engineering, electronics, and tactical driving skills.
rules: No hazardous chemicals or fire-based weapons
Remote control frequency must be declared

title: Alumni Meet & Greet
description: Connect with the Legends. An exclusive networking event to bridge the gap between current students and successful KIET alumni working in Fortune 500 companies. Get personalized career advice and referral insights.
rules: Exclusive for Final and Pre-final year students

title: UI/UX Design Bootcamp
description: Master the Art of Design. A hands-on intensive workshop focusing on Figma, user research, and prototyping. Learn to build pixel-perfect interfaces that solve real user problems.

title: E-Cell Startup Pitch
description: Have a Billion-Dollar Idea? Pitch your business plan to a panel of venture capitalists and investors. Get a chance to secure seed funding and professional incubation support.

title: Annual Tech Symposium
description: The Showcase of Innovation. A massive exhibition featuring the best final-year projects and industrial prototypes. Meet recruiters and attend keynote speeches on emerging tech like 6G.
rules: Projects must be pre-approved by HOD
